steps.title: Keep one main verb
steps.content: The sentence's subject is a team of researchers, and its main verb is analyzed. The blank should modify the researchers' purpose without adding a second finite verb before analyzed.

steps.title: Use a participle
steps.content: Choice A, Choice B, and Choice C all add finite verb phrases that compete with analyzed as the main verb. A present participle modifies the team and lets analyzed remain the only main verb. The answer is D.
